response: The German computer repair technician who may have inspired *Diary of a Cannibal* is Armin Meiwes. He is known as the "Rotenburg Cannibal" or "Der Metzgermeister" (The Master Butcher), and his real-life story, which involved killing and eating a voluntary victim, is loosely based on the plot of the film. Meiwes gained international notoriety for his violent acts and is the subject of the horror film *Diary of a Cannibal*, which was inspired by his true-crime story.
